transcript.content: Can you publish the ad spend ROI update to growth-review? The dashboard already has a number, but use the warehouse if that is safer.

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS rows, SUM(metric_value) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN reconciled THEN metric_value END) AS reconciled_total, SUM(CASE WHEN reconciled THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reconciled_rows, MIN(loaded_at), MAX(loaded_at) FROM ad_events;
